title: Fix Skopeo tests with latest containers/image and kubernetes
body: @runc0m here you go, this is based off erikh/image@kube-fix.

comments.body: Let's see if tests pass here :) @mtrmac

LGTM.

After https://github.com/containers/image/pull/214 is merged, please restore the `github.com/containers/image master` line, rerun `vndr` and update this PR.
